title: Krytox gpl 105
description: Krytox GPL 105 - 10 grams net weight in handy dropper bottle. High performance PPPE anti-squeak oil for the automotive industry. Krytox GPL oils are based on perfluoropolyethers (PFPE) and provide superior stability, lubricity, viscosity and value. Krytox GPL 105 is a high performance, fully fluorinated oil that provides superior lubrication in a wide temperature range and unmatched chemical resistance. The inert nature of Krytox ensures it lasts longer than other chemical substances such as silicone and carbon-based lubricants. This unique base oil is 100% non-flammable and does not support combustion, even in environments with 100% liquid or gaseous oxygen. The applied lubricant does not migrate and is ideal for automotive applications, especially for eliminating NVH (noise, vibration and hardness). The industry standard recommended Krytox grade for squeak and rattle protection is GPL 105 as recommended by VW Group including Audi, Skoda and Seat, Plus, Land Rover etc. Important considerations before use: the surface for application must be clean before application. by Krytox. GPL 105 - Free from body wax, silicone etc. methylated spirits as a solvent can be used before application to achieve this. - The application amounts should be minimal, resist the temptation to apply excessively. Be aware of impurities in unwanted areas such as glass and paint as they are very difficult to remove.
about_product: Anti Squeak,Anti Crank,Rubber Gaskets
Eliminates squeaking and creaking in automotive applications
Non-flammable, non-flammable, BAM certified, NSF H1 certified
1:1 replacement part for Volkswagen VW / Seat / Skoda / Audi G052172A1
Viscosity of 160 cST at 40 °C
interest_reason: Industrial lubricant and clearly a chemical product

title: FROSAL Replacement Wheel 260 x 75 mm - Pack of 2 - Puncture-proof PU Wheel with Steel Rim - Centric Hub Diameter 25 x 75 mm - for Handcart, Sack Truck & Transport Truck - Maintenance-Free & Durable
description:
The Frosal replacement wheel 260 x 75 mm is the optimal choice for handcarts, sack trucks, garden trolleys and transport carts where reliability and freedom from maintenance are required. 
Thanks to the robust steel rim and the puncture-proof PU foam tyres, the wheel is durable, dimensionally stable and completely airless - no flat foot, no pumping, no air loss. With a wheel height of approx. 260 mm, a tyre width of 75 mm and a centric hub (diameter 25 mm, 75 mm length), the wheel fits many common axle systems. 
It runs smoothly on solid surfaces and is perfect for regular use in the garden, in the workshop or during leisure transport. Care and durability: 
PU wheels are maintenance-free, quiet and very durable. 
If the wheel stands for a long time in heat or high continuous load, small pressure points can occur - this is typical of the material and not a product defect. 
Such areas can usually be heated by short heating (e.g. with hot water). Tip: 
For use with permanent standing load, such as For boat trailers, we recommend our pneumatic tyre models. Variants: 
Available as a set of 1, 2 or 4 - ideal for retrofitting or for the complete replacement of existing wheels.
about_product: Versatile: replacement wheels for handcart, sack truck, hand cart and transport carts - robust, quiet and durable
interest_reason: Non-medical, non-chemical hardware product (replacement wheels) suitable for resale.

Information about the brand "Narubb": 

* Famous tyre brand - "Narubb" is a leading tyre brand with innovative products in the middle price segment. The first factory was established in Taiwan in 1990. Over the course of 30 years, the company "Narubb" has become an international manufacturer/exporter based in Taiwan, China and Vietnam. It specialises in the production of industrial tyres, motorcycle and scooter tyres as well as tyres for light trucks and agricultural machinery. 

* Know-how - All the know-how consists of the state-of-the-art research and development department in Taiwan. They have their own research facilities to bring new high-quality products to the market. Quality control is carried out by the in-house laboratory based on the world's most stringent quality standards such as DOT, QCVN, SNI, E-MARK, TCVN and ISO 9001
about_product: The size 6.50-16 agricultural hose is an essential component for a wide range of agricultural machinery, including tractors, farmwagons, trailers and farm tractors.
This tube fits 6.50-16 and 6.00-16 tyres and is a brand new product from the current production.

Made from durable rubber, it offers excellent flexibility and resistance to punctures, which is crucial in the difficult working conditions in the field. The hose is also characterized by high temperature resistance, which ensures its reliability all year round.

Thanks to the use of a special rubber compound, the hose is resistant to ageing and ozone, which extends its service life even during intensive use. Its characteristic features are a significantly higher stretching behaviour, which makes it fill the tyre well.

The hose is equipped with a TR13 straight rubber valve that allows easy inflation and maintenance of the correct pressure, which is important for maintaining proper adhesion and minimising tyre wear. This is a product that increases the efficiency of working with agricultural machinery and provides safety as well as comfort for the operator

title: Liqui Moly Pro-Line Engine Flush
description: Product description               Liqui Moly Pro-Line engine flushing is a development product based on highly effective state-of-the-art additive technology. The highly effective detergent and dispersant additives in combination with the carrier fluid have been tested in numerous laboratory and practical field tests for the dissolution of sludge and paint formers. Oil-soluble and oil-insoluble residues of all kinds are suspended and removed from the oil cycle during oil change. The engine freed from deposits and dirt and the fresh oil, which is not contaminated by contaminated sites, can thus develop the full performance. Features - high economy - gentle cleaning - suitable for diesel particulate filter - turbo and cat tested - easy to use - no environmental impact - neutral against common sealing materials - quick cleaning area of application for cleaning and flushing oil circuits in petrol and diesel engines. Application: a 500 ml can is sufficient up to 5 litres of oil capacity. Add Pro-Line engine flush to the warm engine oil before changing the oil. After adding the motor, depending on the degree of soiling, approx. 10-15 minutes. run idle. Then perform oil and filter change filter changes. Pro-Line engine flush is compatible with standard engine oils. Note: Not suitable for use in motorcycles with wet clutches                  Ingredients               Engine flushing
